creator: steve.roome@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I'm the maintainer of xglurbules.

A very old email address is listed both on the contributors and in the port.

Can these both please be updated to steve.roome@gmail.com as listed on the master website for the port.

I intend to update the xglurbules port to fix a few issues, move it to github or gitlabb.

The main website for it reflects this information also and I will then be able to spot any issues anyone sends me.

Many thanks.
